ai-w11-e1.answer: Generate banking ER: Customer, Account, Transaction. Draw and implement 3 Flyway scripts.
ai-w11-e1.realWorld: Portfolio piece: schema + ER image in README.

ai-w11-e2.answer: E-commerce schema to 3NF. Identify duplicate product name on order lines — normalize.

ai-w11-e3.answer: Write CTE query: top 3 products by revenue per category. Run and verify counts.
ai-w11-e3.realWorld: Window functions — common data interview question.

ai-w11-e4.answer: Slow query + EXPLAIN. Apply index or rewrite. Document before/after ms.
ai-w11-e4.realWorld: Proof in README: 'Query 2s → 40ms with index on status, created_at.'

ai-w11-e5.answer: List top 5 queries from your app. Ask index recommendations. Add one, measure.
ai-w11-e5.realWorld: Partial index WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' — smaller, faster for hot path.

ai-w11-e6.answer: Reproduce N+1: log SQL count in test. Fix with @EntityGraph or JOIN FETCH.
ai-w11-e6.realWorld: 1 + N queries → 1 query — dramatic improvement on list endpoints.

ai-w11-e7.answer: MongoDB aggregation for monthly sales. Import sample docs, run pipeline.

ai-w11-e8.answer: Flyway V1 baseline + V2 add column migration. Run on clean DB.
ai-w11-e8.realWorld: mvn flyway:migrate — same flow as team CI.

ai-w11-e9.answer: Lazy vs eager on @ManyToOne: default lazy, eager only when always needed. Explain trade-off for your entity.
ai-w11-e9.realWorld: Eager Order→Customer loads customers always — often N+1 or over-fetch.

ai-w11-e10.answer: Review schema for denormalization without reason, missing FKs, nullable everything.
ai-w11-e10.realWorld: NOT NULL on required fields — data quality at DB layer.
